channel.title: Random Operators and Stochastic Equations
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Random Operators and Stochastic Equations

item.title: Existence results for a coupled system of fractional stochastic differential equations involving Hilfer derivative
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2015

item.title: Minimax interpolation of continuous time stochastic processes with periodically correlated increments observed with noise
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2016

item.title: On optimal control of coupled mean-field forward-backward stochastic equations
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2017

item.title: Double sequences of complex uncertain variables associated with multiplier sequences
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2018

item.title: The estimator G 59 for the solutions of the regularized Kolmogorov--Wiener filter
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2019

item.title: Canonical equation K 107 for symmetric matrix with independent zebra random lines
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2020

item.title: Existence of a weak solution to a Markovian BSDE with discontinuous coefficients
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2025

item.title: Generalized delay BSDE driven by fractional Brownian motion
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2026

item.title: Stochastic integration respect a cylindrical martingale-Lévy process with second moments
item.description: Article by Anddy Alvarado-Solano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2027
